results.title: Bán bánh mì 5.000 - 25.000 đồng, lãi chỉ 10 -15% nhưng mỗi lần xuất hóa đơn điện tử mất 500 đồng, hộ kinh doanh gặp khó: Cục Thuế nói gì?
results.description: Hộ kinh doanh mong cơ quan Thuế có chính sách dành cụ thể về hóa đơn điện tử dành cho những ngành hàng bán lẻ có doanh thu thấp, số lượng hóa đơn nhiều.

results.title: Jennifer Vargas impacta con su historia inspiradora en el podcast Juntos en Familia
results.description: Diario Azua / 12 de marzo 2026La CEO de JenDecorVariety comparte como convirtió su pasión en un negocio exitoso con el apoyo de su familia y marcas aliadasSanto Domingo / Bronx, NY – La emprendedora y productora de eventos Jennifer Vargas, CEO de JenDecorVariety, cautivó a la audiencia del reconocido podcast Juntos en Familia al compartir su inspiradora historia de superación y éxito empresarial.

results.title: Retired Estonian military chiefs back ex-ECDI execs' move to defense firm
results.description: Retired generals Martin Herem and Veiko-Vello Palm defended two former top Estonian Center for Defense Investments (ECDI) executives for joining the private defense sector.

results.title: Le bas niveau de la Mauve inquiète à Saint-Ay
results.description: Un phénomène inhabituel touche une partie du cours de la rivière. Son niveau est anormalement bas, environ 20 ou 30 centimètres en dessous de la normale à mi-mars, selon propriétaire d'un terrain qui borde la Mauve, à Saint-Ay.

results.title: What the 2025-26 Season Has Made Obvious
results.description: What Recent Football League Results Reveal About Modern Betting PatternsIt's possible to distinguish between what is happening on the field and the reaction in the betting markets by March in the 2025-26 season.

results.title: Iran war: Experts warns bombing oil infrastructure in Iran to leave lasting environmental damage
results.description: The fallout from fighting in the Middle East, from burning oil refineries to sunken ships, threatens lasting repercussions for the health of the region's people, water and food supplies, and ecosystems.

results.title: Sungrow y Delta Capacity refuerzan su colaboración con un acuerdo marco de 1 GWh BESS firmado en el Energy Storage Summit
results.description: El acuerdo respalda la estrategia de Delta Capacity de crear una cartera diversificada y paneuropea de activos BESS de alta calidad diseñados para su propiedad y explotación a largo plazo.
